description: Role-specific review checklists for persona-based approvals

checklist.text: Technical approach is feasible and aligns with customer requirements
checklist.helpText: Verify the proposed solution can be delivered with available technology and resources

checklist.text: No commitments to unsupported SLAs or outcomes
checklist.helpText: Ensure no performance guarantees beyond our control or without proper measurement

checklist.text: All technical assumptions are clearly stated
checklist.helpText: Document assumptions about environments, integrations, performance, scalability

checklist.text: Performance and scalability considerations addressed
checklist.helpText: Confirm non-functional requirements are covered appropriately

checklist.text: Security and compliance requirements identified
checklist.helpText: Ensure security review tasks are included if needed; compliance requirements documented

checklist.text: Integration points and dependencies documented
checklist.helpText: List all external systems, third-party dependencies, and integration approaches

checklist.text: Technical governance during delivery planned
checklist.helpText: Code reviews, architecture checkpoints, quality gates defined

checklist.text: Timeline is realistic and achievable
checklist.helpText: Verify schedule accounts for complexity, dependencies, and resource availability

checklist.text: Resource plan includes all necessary roles
checklist.helpText: PM, Architect, Developers, QA, etc. per project needs with realistic allocation

checklist.text: All high risks have identified mitigations
checklist.helpText: Review risk register and ensure mitigation plans exist for critical/high risks

checklist.text: Support transition plan is defined
checklist.helpText: Who will operate the solution after go-live? Hypercare period defined?

checklist.text: Resource availability confirmed or plan to secure
checklist.helpText: Named resources committed or clear path to staffing defined

checklist.text: Delivery methodology aligns with project type
checklist.helpText: Agile, Waterfall, Sure Step - appropriate for scope, customer, and team

checklist.text: Solution aligns with practice standards and best practices
checklist.helpText: Follows domain-specific guidance, patterns, and delivery frameworks

checklist.text: Sold margin meets or exceeds threshold
checklist.helpText: Verify margin is acceptable or exception is justified with mitigation

checklist.text: All customer obligations are clearly documented
checklist.helpText: Customer responsibilities section is complete and realistic

checklist.text: Scope is clearly defined with in/out boundaries
checklist.helpText: No ambiguous scope items; clear in-scope and out-of-scope delineation

checklist.text: Resource mix is appropriate for deal type
checklist.helpText: Onshore/offshore balance optimizes delivery quality and margin

checklist.text: No non-standard terms without proper approval
checklist.helpText: Check for unusual financial, legal, or liability terms requiring escalation

checklist.text: SoW supports customer business outcomes and success plan
checklist.helpText: Aligns with strategic account objectives and customer success metrics

checklist.text: Consumption goals are aligned (if applicable)
checklist.helpText: Verify solution drives Azure/M365 consumption as planned in account strategy

checklist.text: Customer relationship and satisfaction considerations addressed
checklist.helpText: Ensure delivery approach maintains and strengthens customer relationship

checklist.text: Support model is sustainable for long-term partnership
checklist.helpText: Post-delivery support aligns with account strategy and customer expectations

checklist.text: Scope is clearly defined and bounded
checklist.helpText: No ambiguous phrasing or open-ended commitments in scope definition

checklist.text: All customer obligations are listed
checklist.helpText: Customer responsibilities section is complete with specific items

checklist.text: Risks and assumptions are documented
checklist.helpText: Risk register and assumptions are comprehensive and realistic

checklist.text: Mitigation plans exist for high risks
checklist.helpText: Each critical/high risk has an owner and documented mitigation strategy

checklist.text: No use of banned phrases or problematic language
checklist.helpText: Check for 'best effort', 'guarantee', 'satisfaction', etc.

checklist.text: Deliverable acceptance process is defined
checklist.helpText: Clear, objective criteria for how customer validates each deliverable
